name: Lucera
short_description: Hunt monsters and level up your character in a retro fantasy setting. Further make your character stronger with rare loot from monsters and by increasing character skills.
detailed_description:
Level up your character by hunting various monsters, taking place in a medieval fantasy setting. As you level up your character and it becomes stronger you will be able to take on stronger monsters. Your character also grows stronger by equipping items dropped by enemies, as well from increasing character skills such as melee fighting and defense skill.

    • Fight enemies such as dragons, orcs, dwarves, and minotaurs
    • Loot items to make your character stronger or sell at NPC to further found your adventures
    • Find hidden caves and items and encounter boss monsters
    • Play as either male or female
    • Increase the strength of your character by increasing various skills such as melee fighting and magic level
    • Possibility to use three different fighting styles: melee fighter, bowman, and magician
